narrative:
North Royalton -04-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 867 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
